untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'confirmed forced liquidation or panic event' and 'negative hotline message' which are qualitative, event-driven triggers not expressible via price/volume/technical indicators. 'Spread widened beyond 1 standard deviation' requires bid-ask spread data (not available in allowed indicators). 'Multiple offer levels cascading downward in real-time' requires order book microstructure data. '25% recovery' exit requires tracking entry price dynamically. Position size parameter (15% of account) is noted but implemented as stop_loss_pct approximation.
translation_notes: Translated panic conditions into closest quantitative proxies: volume spike via vol_ratio_20 > 0.75 (75th percentile equivalent), support break via close < s1 (first support level from Pivot), and volatility spike via hvol_20. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved. Exit condition simplified to upward price reversal. Unable to capture event-driven liquidation signals, spread mechanics, or dynamic entry-price-relative targets. This is a significant approximation of the original signal intent.
